name: Diablo Valley
description_short: Diablo Valley Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, NCUA-insured credit union offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards with access to 30,000+ nationwide ATMs.
description_long:
Diablo Valley Federal Credit Union is a federally-chartered credit union serving members with a full suite of consumer financial products. As a credit union, it operates on a not-for-profit, member-owned basis with NCUA insurance backing deposits up to $250,000. The organization provides traditional banking services alongside specialized credit union offerings, maintaining physical branches and digital banking channels including mobile apps and e*Teller online access.

The credit union offers comprehensive financial services including checking and savings accounts, youth accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs). On the lending side, they provide auto loans, motorcycle/RV/boat loans, personal loans, mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and Visa credit cards with rewards options. Current promotions highlight a 3.41% APY 90-day certificate special and no-fee home equity lines of credit. Members benefit from access to a national CO-OP network of nearly 30,000 ATMs and over 5,000 branches nationwide with no surcharges.

Diablo Valley FCU distinguishes itself through member-focused benefits unavailable at traditional banks, including shared branching access, vacation discount partnerships with GetAwayToday.com, and a full-service 24-hour call center. The credit union provides online loan applications, printable forms for flexibility, bill pay services, and Apple Pay integration. Their transparent fee structure is published online, and they offer financial education resources including calculators and Practical Money Skills materials. Holiday closures are clearly communicated, with e*Teller and telephone services remaining available during branch closures.

The main limitation is that as a regional credit union, membership eligibility and service area details are not prominently displayed on the homepage, requiring members to contact the institution or visit locations to confirm account opening requirements. While they advertise competitive rates on certificates and no-fee home equity products, specific APR ranges for loans and credit card terms require deeper navigation or direct inquiry. The website emphasizes product availability without detailed fee schedules prominently featured on main pages.
services: Certificates of deposit (CDs) with promotional rates
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs) and Coverdell ESAs
Home equity lines of credit (no fees)
Visa credit cards including rewards options
Bill pay and e*Teller online banking
Shared branching and ATM network access
Loan calculators and financial education resources
pros: Access to 30,000+ ATMs and 5,000+ branches nationwide with no surcharges through CO-OP network
NCUA-insured deposits up to $250,000 backed by full faith and credit of U.S. government
No-fee home equity lines of credit with competitive rates
24/7 e*Teller, telephone teller, and call center services even during branch closures
Online and mobile banking with secure applications for accounts and loans
Member discounts through GetAwayToday.com partnership for vacations and amusement parks
Competitive CD rates (3.41% APY on 90-day certificates for $10K-$100K)
cons: Membership eligibility criteria and service area not clearly disclosed on website
Specific APR ranges, interest rates, and detailed fee schedules require contacting the credit union
Limited information about loan approval timelines and credit score requirements
No apparent online rate comparison tools for different loan products
Youth account features and requirements not detailed on main navigation
best_for: Members seeking full-service banking with nationwide ATM/branch access without surcharges
Consumers interested in no-fee home equity credit products
Savers looking for competitive CD rates and NCUA deposit insurance
Members wanting 24/7 digital and phone banking convenience alongside traditional branch services
diagnosis: Diablo Valley Federal Credit Union is best for existing and prospective members seeking a full-service credit union with competitive products, extensive ATM/branch access, and 24/7 digital banking. Primary caveat: membership eligibility and service area restrictions are not transparent on the website, requiring direct contact with the credit union to confirm account opening availability and any membership requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Diablo Valley — Credit Union in Concord, CA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Diablo Valley — NCUA-insured credit union in Concord, CA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
